PropertiesPage.title: All our accommodations
PropertiesPage.description: Discover our exclusive selection of properties around the world.
PropertiesPage.emptyDescription: Please check back later to discover our new offers.
PropertiesPage.pagination: {total, plural, =0 {No results} =1 {1 result found} other {{total} results found}}

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.text: Welcome to Guen's travel. By using our platform, you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.

booking.title: 2. Bookings and Payments
booking.text: All bookings are subject to accommodation availability. Prices are quoted in FCFA, all taxes included.

cancellation.title: 3. Cancellation Policy
cancellation.text: Cancellation conditions vary depending on the selected establishment. Please refer to the specific section during your booking process.

liability.title: 4. Liability
liability.text: Guen's travel acts as an intermediary. We cannot be held responsible for direct disputes between the accommodation provider and the traveler.

escrow.title: Escrow Guarantee
escrow.desc: Secure payment: your funds are held until your check-in.

payment.title: Flexible Payment
payment.desc: Pay with confidence using our secure methods.

About.title: Redefining the <green>travel experience</green>
About.subtitle: We connect travelers to the most authentic establishments with total transparency.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To simplify accommodation booking with intuitive and human-centered technology.

trust.title: Total Trust
trust.text: Every establishment is rigorously verified to ensure your comfort.

passion.title: Travel Passion
passion.text: We believe every stay should be a memorable and unique experience.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.text: A dedicated team available at any time to assist you.

Footer.description: Guen's travel is the leading platform for booking hotels, apartments, and luxury accommodations in Cameroon and Africa. Book your stay with confidence.

Help.title: Help Center
Help.subtitle: How can we help you today?

faq.q1: How do I cancel my booking?
faq.a1: You can cancel your booking via your client account. Fees may apply depending on the establishment's policy.
faq.q2: How do I get an invoice?
faq.a2: Once your stay is completed, your invoice will be available in your booking history.
faq.q3: How do I change my stay dates?
faq.a3: Changes are subject to availability. Please contact the host directly or our support team.

contact.title: Didn't find an answer?
contact.subtitle: Our team is available 24/7 to answer you via email.

data.title: 1. Data Collection
data.text: We collect the information you provide when registering or booking (name, email, phone number, payment details).

usage.title: 2. Data Usage
usage.text: Your information is used to manage your bookings, provide customer support, and send important notifications regarding your stays.

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.text: We do not sell your data. We only share the necessary information with our partner accommodation providers to confirm your booking.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. Contact us at privacy@guenstravel.cm for any requests.

Careers.title: Join the Guen's travel adventure
Careers.subtitle: We are building the future of travel in Africa. Come innovate with us.

culture.impact: Real impact on the tourism sector

spontaneous.title: Can't find the perfect fit?
spontaneous.text: We are always looking for new talent. Send us your CV and a cover letter.

AppPromo.title: Travel lighter with the Guen's travel app
AppPromo.description: Book, manage your stays, and access your tickets right from your pocket. Scan the QR code to download our app.

Metadata.title: Book your ideal stay
Metadata.description: Find the best accommodations, villas, and hotels.

Auth.title: Client Portal
Auth.subtitle: Guen's Travel — Manage your properties, track bookings, and drive your revenue.
Auth.securityNote: Encrypted and secure connection. Reserved for registered partners.

RegisterCustomer.title: Create your traveler account
RegisterCustomer.subtitle: Book your dream stays in just a few clicks.

hero.title: Travel the world with <green>simplicity</green>
hero.subtitle: Find and book flights to hundreds of destinations at the best guaranteed price.

escrow.title: Secure Booking
escrow.desc: Your payments and bookings are protected at every stage.

payment.title: Flexible Payment
payment.desc: Pay by credit card or via your local mobile solutions.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: A dedicated team assists you before, during, and after your trip.
